title: Perform a partial water change
description: Learn how to remove dirty water and refill your tank with conditioned water.

dialogue.text: Regular water changes keep fish healthy. Gather a siphon, bucket, water conditioner, and a utility cart to haul the water, then remove about 25% of the water.

options.text: Got it. How do I start?

dialogue.text: Use a siphon or gravel vacuum to gently drain water into a clean bucket while lifting debris. Keep the intake away from fish and stop after roughly a quarter of the volume is gone.
Treat tap water with dechlorinator and match it to the tank's temperature before refilling. Pour slowly to avoid shocking fish.

options.text: Tank refilled and fish are happy!
